subtitle.purpose: Detail page headings (DetailPageHeader), paired with breadcrumb.

body.purpose: Descriptions, table cells, form help text.

label.purpose: Column headers, field labels, badge text.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default card elevation, subtle separation from background.

shadows.name: input-rest
shadows.purpose: Subtle depth on inputs against transparent background.

motion.name: fleet-view-in
motion.purpose: List/card view switch animation. Fade + translateY.

motion.name: color-transition
motion.purpose: Hover/focus color shifts on buttons and inputs.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid orange action button. Dark ink text for WCAG AA compliance.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: #ff9429; color: #261d18; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e68525; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fffdfa, 0 0 0 4px #ff9429; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #f7f3ee; color: #70645c; box-shadow: none; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: #fffdfa; color: #261d18; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid #e7e0da; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f4ebe1; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fffdfa, 0 0 0 4px #ff9429; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent button for tertiary actions, icon buttons, nav items.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: #261d18; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f4ebe1; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fffdfa, 0 0 0 4px #ff9429; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; background: #e63737; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #cf3131; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fffdfa, 0 0 0 4px #e63737; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with warm border and orange focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 36px; width: 100%; padding: 4px 12px; background: transparent; color: #261d18; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; border: 1px solid #e7e0da; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #70645c; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #ff9429; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255, 148, 41, 0.7); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Status Card
components.description: White card with optional full-border status tinting. No side stripes.
components.html:
garage-node-1Healthy

3 partitions, 1.2 TB stored
components.css: .ds-status-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e0da; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); transition: box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-status-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); } .ds-status-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-status-card-title { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #261d18; } .ds-status-card-desc { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #70645c; margin: 0; } .ds-badge-success { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; background: rgba(21, 127, 60, 0.1); color: #157f3c; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar nav link with orange active indicator.
components.html: OverviewBuckets
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; color: #261d18; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f4ebe1; } .ds-nav-active { background: rgba(255, 148, 41, 0.12); color: #261d18; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
A craftsman's workbench: warm wood tones, honest materials, purposeful tools laid out where the hand expects them. The orange is the branded handle on every tool; the warm neutrals are the bench surface, worn smooth by use. Nothing decorative, everything functional, but the whole composition has the quiet beauty of a well-organized workspace.

This system rejects three things absolutely: the flashy SaaS dashboard (gradient heroes, vanity metrics, sales chrome), the bare-bones CLI wrapper (terminal output in HTML tables), and the over-designed dev tool (consumer-app ornament on infrastructure surfaces). The console earns trust through precision and restraint, not through visual spectacle.

Light theme only. The operators work in well-lit contexts (server rooms, offices, home labs); dark mode is intentionally out of scope. The palette is a restrained four-color system: theme orange for actions and brand, red for errors, green for health, purple for warnings. Everything else is warm neutral.
keyCharacteristics: Warm neutrals ground the interface; the orange accent is reserved for primary actions and selection state
Single typeface (Manrope) across all levels, hierarchy through weight and size only
Rounded but sturdy components (8px radius on cards, 6px on controls)
Density without clutter: tables with many rows, detail pages with all the fields, whitespace as structure
Responsive table-to-card pattern (ResourceList) so mobile loses no information

rules.name: The Four-Color Discipline
rules.body: No color exists outside the four-signal system. If a new status needs a color, it maps to one of the four. No teal, no blue, no secondary accent. The palette's restraint is its identity.

rules.name: The Dark-Ink-on-Orange Rule
rules.body: White text on Garage Orange is prohibited (fails WCAG AA at 2.21:1). Every orange fill uses #261d18 as foreground.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Manrope everywhere. No display font for heroes, no monospace for data (unless rendering actual code/terminal output via the TerminalOutput component). Hierarchy is weight and size, never typeface.

rules.name: The Flat-First Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation from background) or to establish a popover/dropdown layer. No decorative shadows. No shadows on buttons, inputs, or inline elements at rest (inputs get shadow-sm as the single exception, for subtle depth on the transparent background).

dos: Do use dark ink (#261d18) on every Garage Orange fill. Never white text on orange.
Do use 10%-opacity tints of semantic colors for badge/status backgrounds, with the full-strength color as text.
Do use the full-border status pattern on cards (StatusCard). A subtle tinted border around the whole card, not a thick side stripe.
Do keep the palette to exactly four chromatic signals (orange, red, green, purple). Map new statuses to existing colors.
Do use Manrope at every hierarchy level. Vary weight (400-800) and size, never typeface.
Do provide prefers-reduced-motion: reduce alternatives for every animation.
Do expand touch targets to 44px on pointer-coarse devices (pointer-coarse:min-h-11).
donts: Don't use gradient heroes, vanity metric cards, or sales-driven chrome. This is infrastructure tooling, not a growth product.
Don't ship a component that looks like terminal output in an HTML table. The console is deliberately designed; raw data gets formatting, hierarchy, and whitespace.
Don't add consumer-app ornament (decorative illustrations, playful micro-interactions, whimsical empty states). Components serve the task.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, alerts, or callouts.
Don't introduce colors outside the four-signal system. No teal info banners, no blue links, no secondary accent hue.
Don't use a display or decorative font anywhere.
Don't apply shadows to buttons or inputs at rest (inputs get shadow-sm as the documented exception).
Don't animate layout properties or use choreographed page-load sequences. Motion is 150-250ms state feedback only.
